dob.title: Identity verification
dob.subtitle: Enter your date of birth
dob.wrong: Date of birth doesn't match. Attempts: {{tries}}/3
dob.tooManyTries: Too many attempts. Returning to home screen.

panic.title: Panic Button
panic.exclude48Desc: You will not be allowed to play for 48 hours.
panic.excludePermDesc: Permanent exclusion from all our casinos.
panic.confirmText: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
panic.success: Your request has been submitted successfully.
panic.howTo:
1. Insert your card into the reader.
2. Enter your date of birth to verify.
3. Choose 48-hour or permanent exclusion.
4. Confirm. Our staff will contact you if needed.
panic.noEmail: No email on file — please add it at reception.
panic.noEmailWarning: No email on file. Please add or update your email at the reception to receive an email confirmation.
panic.responsibleGaming:
Gambling is prohibited for persons under 18 years of age. Participation in gambling may be harmful.

At the casino reception you can set or change self-limiting measures:
Ø Number of visits to the gaming area per 1 calendar month
Ø For technical games you can set:
  o maximum amount of bets per 1 calendar day,
  o maximum amount of bets per 1 calendar month,
  o maximum net loss per 1 calendar day,
  o maximum net loss per 1 calendar month,
  o maximum number of logins into the user account per 1 calendar month,
  o maximum total login time into the user account per 1 calendar day,
  o cool-off period during which a new bet cannot be placed after logout.

Ø For live games you can set the maximum net loss for:
  a) 1 calendar day
  b) 1 calendar month

Institutions dealing with prevention and treatment of problem gambling:

Adiktologická poradna PREVENT České Budějovice
Františka Ondříčka 2, 370 11 České Budějovice
Tel.: +420 725 708 078, Email: ap@prevent99.cz

Klinika adiktologie 1. LF UK a VFN v Praze
Apolinářská 4, 128 00 Praha 2
Tel.: +420 224 968 208, Email: adambulance@vfn.cz

Adiktologická poradna ARKA
Hornická poliklinika, Sokolská tř. 2587/81, 702 00 Ostrava
Tel.: 734 377 810, Email: arka@email.cz

1. Insert your card into the reader.
2. Enter your date of birth to verify.
3. View your personal details and card balance.
playerInfo.tierInfo: Your card level reflects your loyalty status with us. Higher tiers unlock additional benefits — ask our staff for details about upgrades, points and rewards.
